items.definition_en: A pen is used for writing.
items.example_en: I wrote a note with my pen.

items.definition_en: A pencil is used for drawing or writing.
items.example_en: She drew a picture with a pencil.

items.definition_en: A notebook is a book for writing notes.
items.example_en: He keeps his ideas in a notebook.

items.definition_en: An envelope is used to send letters.
items.example_en: I put the letter in an envelope.

items.definition_en: An eraser removes pencil marks.
items.example_en: She used an eraser to fix her mistake.

items.definition_en: A ruler is used to draw straight lines.
items.example_en: He measured the paper with a ruler.

items.definition_en: A marker is a pen for writing or drawing in bold lines.
items.example_en: She colored the sign with a red marker.

items.definition_en: A paper clip holds sheets of paper together.
items.example_en: I kept the papers together with a paper clip.

items.definition_en: A stapler attaches papers with metal staples.
items.example_en: He needs a stapler to join the documents.

items.definition_en: A highlighter makes important words stand out.
items.example_en: She uses a highlighter for key points.

items.definition_en: A folder is used to keep documents together.
items.example_en: Please put the forms in a folder.

items.definition_en: A sticky note is a small piece of paper that sticks.
items.example_en: I left him a sticky note on his desk.

items.definition_en: Scissors are used for cutting paper.
items.example_en: She cut the photo with scissors.

items.definition_en: A glue stick is used to stick paper together.
items.example_en: He used a glue stick for the project.

items.definition_en: A calculator helps with math problems.
items.example_en: She uses a calculator for her work.

items.definition_en: A clipboard holds papers while you write.
items.example_en: He took notes on his clipboard.

items.definition_en: An envelope opener helps open envelopes easily.
items.example_en: She used an envelope opener to open the mail.

items.definition_en: A binder keeps loose sheets of paper together.
items.example_en: The papers are organized in a binder.

items.definition_en: A sharpener is used to make pencils sharp.
items.example_en: She used a sharpener for her new pencil.

items.definition_en: Sticky tape is used to fasten things together.
items.example_en: He closed the box with sticky tape.
